on_token_expired.action: Run scripts/refresh-gsc-token.py. If fails, mark GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE.
on_token_expired.do_not: Use cached data as live. Report impressions/clicks as current.

on_auth_error_401_403.action: Refresh token. If refresh fails, alert Qasem for re-auth.
on_auth_error_401_403.report: GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE — authentication failed. Qasem re-auth needed.
on_auth_error_401_403.do_not: Fall back to cached/manual data as automated source.

on_rate_limit_429.action: Wait 60s, retry once. If still 429, mark GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE.

on_api_delayed.action: Report API_AVAILABLE_THROUGH_DATE with the last date that has complete data.
on_api_delayed.do_not: Claim data is 'live' if it's delayed.

on_cache_fallback.rule: NEVER use cached files as live data. If cache is the only source, mark STALE_AND_NOT_TRUSTED. Do not report as current.

on_success.report: Use gsc-api-truth-current.json as the single source of truth.

performance_claims_without_api.rule: If GSC API is unavailable, do NOT report impressions, clicks, CTR, or position as current data. Say GSC_API_UNAVAILABLE.
performance_claims_without_api.allowed_tasks: Continue non-GSC tasks (indexing, internal links, outreach, deploys). Only block tasks that require fresh GSC data.

manual_ui_values.rule: Qasem's manual checks are USER-OBSERVED COMPARISONS. They are NOT pipeline truth. Mention only as comparison, never as replacement.
